title: Deadly Crash Under Investigation in West Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a fatal crash on Yorkmont Road. Details are still emerging as the investigation unfolds.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes raise concerns about road safety and require thorough investigation to prevent future incidents.

title: Pedestrian Hospitalized After Being Hit by Vehicle
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized after being struck by a vehicle on Albemarle Road Friday evening.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers pedestrians face and the importance of road safety awareness.

title: Rain Expected on Easter Sunday
summary: Easter Sunday forecast predicts widespread showers and possible thunderstorms in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Weather forecasts impact holiday plans and outdoor activities for residents.

title: Pedestrian Killed in Southeast Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was killed after being struck by a vehicle on Krefeld Drive in southeast Charlotte overnight.
charlotte_impact: Another pedestrian fatality raises serious concerns about road safety in Charlotte.

title: Man Wanted for Firing into Crowded Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., accused of firing shots into a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights gun violence and the danger it poses to public safety in the community.

title: Escape the Fate to Preview New Music in Charlotte
summary: Escape the Fate and Lacuna Coil will perform at The Underground on April 26, with Escape the Fate teasing new music.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about upcoming local entertainment events.

title: Child Airlifted After Construction Equipment Accident
summary: A child was airlifted to a Winston-Salem hospital after being hit by construction equipment in Burke County.
charlotte_impact: Accidents involving children are particularly concerning and highlight the need for safety measures.

title: Charlotte SHOUT! Returns to Uptown
summary: Charlotte SHOUT! kicks off in Uptown, offering 17 days of art, music, and community events with over 200 attractions.
charlotte_impact: Promotes community engagement and celebrates local arts and culture.

title: Teacher Accused of Child Sex Crime
summary: Zackary Wayne Winchester, an art teacher at Benton Heights Elementary School, is charged with indecent liberties with a minor.
charlotte_impact: Child sex crimes are serious offenses that erode trust in institutions and harm vulnerable individuals.

title: Corey Heim Dominates NASCAR Truck Series Race
summary: Corey Heim wins the NASCAR truck series race at Rockingham, marking his second win of 2026.
charlotte_impact: Sports news provides entertainment and highlights local achievements.

title: Rising Gas Prices Challenge Feeding Charlotte Volunteers
summary: Higher fuel costs are limiting food pickups and deliveries across the community for the nonprofit, Feeding Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Rising gas prices impact community services and food security for vulnerable populations.

title: Autism Changed Father-Son Relationship
summary: A story about a father and son, and how autism allowed them to open up and connect with each other.
charlotte_impact: Highlights personal stories of resilience and the impact of autism on families.

title: Deadly Crash Causes Delays on I-77 in Rock Hill
summary: A driver was struck and killed by another vehicle on I-77 North in Rock Hill after exiting their disabled Jeep.
charlotte_impact: Another fatal traffic incident emphasizes the dangers of highways and the importance of safety precautions.

title: Hickory Police Kill Man Firing at Cars
summary: A person was shot and killed by a Hickory police officer after firing at passing cars on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement and the potential for violence in the community.

title: Whooping Cough Confirmed in Stanly County
summary: Whooping cough, also known as pertussis, has been confirmed in Stanly County, spreading easily through coughs and sneezes.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about infectious diseases and the importance of vaccination.
